goal: No invoicing delivery path reports success unless the send actually succeeded; two legal documents can never share an official number; the approval audit trail is durably recorded.
why: Marios reports 'the system says it sent but nothing arrived.' The audit found 1 CRITICAL (duplicate legal numbers under concurrency) and 15 HIGH (send paths report success while delivering nothing).
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 for lib/, components/, app/.
Task 4 edge change passes deno check (tsc does not cover supabase/functions/**).
Every named toast/reply references a real send-result variable; no unconditional success string remains.
notifyMariosOverWhatsApp returns a boolean; the blank-caption empty-text fallback is removed in both Marios and accounting-group senders.
forwardAccountingAction calls sendDocumentToAccountingGroup; Sophia request_correction/resend call resendCorrectedInvoiceAction; deliverWithManualProvider no longer records queueStatus 'sent'.
Edge documentSent = res.ok; saveLastDocument only on res.ok.
Migration creates a partial unique index on (kind, official_number); numbering allocation is transactional with a 23505 retry (or RPC).
writeRelatedRows inserts into invoice_approvals; fromDocumentRow no longer hardcodes 'Loaded from Supabase document row'.
Existing passing flows unbroken: normal invoice create/approve delivery, credit-note caption, receipt->Marios-only, admin Send-email.

tasks.title: Thread real send-result booleans through the Marios-WhatsApp action layer + fix the blank-caption fallback
acceptance_criteria: notifyMariosOverWhatsApp returns Promise<boolean>, true only when a WhatsApp message actually succeeded.
notifyMariosApprovedAction surfaces the boolean (mariosNotified on DocumentsActionResult).
Blank-caption PDF-send failure never calls sendMessage({text:''}); it retries the document or returns false.
sendDocumentToAccountingGroup blank-caption fallback has the same guard.
Existing callers still compile and keep working.
tasks.action: Make notifyMariosOverWhatsApp (documents.ts:131-196) return Promise<boolean> (false on guard/catch, sent.success on success); in the failure branch (:184-190) only do the text fallback when caption.trim() is non-empty, else return false. notifyMariosApprovedAction (:117-122) surfaces it as mariosNotified; add the field to DocumentsActionResult. Same blank-caption guard in sendDocumentToAccountingGroup (:521-524). Leave notifyGroupOfCreditNote unchanged. Full steps in the plan markdown.

tasks.title: Wire forwardAccountingAction and Sophia request_correction/resend to REAL senders; relabel the no-op manual provider
acceptance_criteria: forwardAccountingAction calls sendDocumentToAccountingGroup with the same caption rule, keeps queueAccountingHandoff for audit only, and surfaces the real result (accountingGroupNotified).
Sophia request_correction and resend intents call resendCorrectedInvoiceAction (the real sender) instead of the queue-only correctResendAction.
deliverWithManualProvider no longer reports queueStatus 'sent' (now 'failed') for a non-send.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0.
tasks.action: forwardAccountingAction (documents.ts:300-307): call sendDocumentToAccountingGroup(updated, caption) before queueAccountingHandoff; add accountingGroupNotified to DocumentsActionResult. intent-handlers.ts: use resendCorrectedInvoiceAction in request_correction (:305-310) and resend (:351-357) instead of correctResendAction. manual-provider.ts:13-24: change queueStatus 'sent' to 'failed', keep deliveryStatus 'manual-copy-ready'. Full steps in the plan markdown.

tasks.title: Gate every admin toast and the Sophia approve reply on the real send results
acceptance_criteria: Approve-from-draft toast names each channel that actually succeeded (capture group boolean + mariosNotified).
Auto-approve-on-create toast claims only the channels (group/Marios/email) that returned true.
Accounting-resend toast gated on forwardAccountingAction result; the false 'Email' claim is dropped.
sent-to-marios toast gated on a real Marios-notified signal; 'bumped in CSC Review group' copy corrected.
Sophia approve reply worded from BOTH the group flag and the Marios flag, naming who was reached.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0.
tasks.action: Thread the Marios boolean through sendToMariosAction (documents.ts:100-111). In App.tsx gate the approve-from-draft (:262-285), auto-approve-on-create (:627-636), accounting-resend (:566-571) and sent-to-marios (:287-292) toasts on the real booleans. In intent-handlers.ts approve (:216-224) word the reply from both group and Marios flags. Remove the unconditional strings. Full steps in the plan markdown.

verification.pattern: sent to Marios and the accounting group

tasks.title: Fix the edge documentSent bug: set it from the real send result, only save last-document on success
acceptance_criteria: Handler captures the Response from sendDocumentByUrl and sets documentSent = res.ok.
saveLastDocument is only called when res.ok is true.
On a non-ok response documentSent stays false (webhook falls through to the text reply) and the status is logged.
deno check passes on the touched file (tsc does NOT cover edge functions).
No behavior change on the success path (backwards compatible).
tasks.action: In invoice.ts:111-134 replace await sendDocumentByUrl(...) with const res = await sendDocumentByUrl(...); set documentSent = res.ok (replacing the unconditional documentSent = true at :118); wrap the saveLastDocument block (:123-131) in if (res.ok); log res.status when !res.ok; remove the misleading 'Non-fatal' comment (:133).

tasks.title: Official-number integrity (DB unique index + transactional allocation + 23505 retry) and durable approval audit trail
acceptance_criteria: Migration creates a partial unique index on invoice_documents (kind, official_number) WHERE official_number IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL.

Official-number allocation is transactional (allocate_official_number RPC) OR saveInvoiceDocument retries the upsert on a 23505 unique violation; a concurrent collision yields distinct numbers, never a duplicate.
writeRelatedRows inserts approval events into invoice_approvals keyed by the resolved internal document_id.
fromDocumentRow no longer hardcodes 'Loaded from Supabase document row'; approvalTimeline is rebuilt from the DB.
Migration is idempotent; if supabase db push fails on history mismatch, apply via dashboard SQL editor (project vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx) and note it.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0.
tasks.action: New migration 20260625120000_invoice_number_integrity_and_approvals.sql: partial UNIQUE INDEX on (kind, official_number) WHERE official_number IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL, plus an allocate_official_number(p_kind) RPC (FOR UPDATE, trailing-numeric max, per-kind floors). writeRelatedRows (:202-241) inserts toApprovalRows keyed by document_id. fromDocumentRow (:205-211) drops the fabricated entry, hydrating approvalTimeline from the DB. Wire the RPC OR a 23505 retry in saveInvoiceDocument.
